title: Prepare Chronik local service activation gate
goal: Define the explicit gate for possible local Chronik user-service activation after bootstrap merge, including env/token handling, smoke evidence, and rollback, without starting the service in this task.

acceptance.assertion: The gate states that systemctl enable/start, restart, deploy, fleet mutation and secret handling require explicit approval.
The activation plan includes non-secret smoke checks and a rollback path.
No service start, restart, enable, deploy or token handling is performed while preparing the gate.

metadata.service_activation_policy: manual explicit approval before any systemctl/deploy/secret action
metadata.depends_on_note: Dispatcher-enforced dependency is the top-level depends_on field.
